title: calophyllum lowei
intro: Calophyllum lowei, also known as the 'Dilo tree', is a medicinal plant species native to the Pacific Islands. It has been traditionally used for its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties, which have been found to be effective in treating various health conditions. The medicinal properties of Calophyllum lowei have been reported to provide health benefits such as wound healing, skin protection, and relief from fungal and bacterial infections. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies like oils, creams, and ointments, which are commonly used to promote skin health and treat various skin conditions.
